zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Anne West於大約1480年出生在英國素可時，她的父親Thomas West 8th Baron de La Warre25歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Mortimer22歲。她於大約1504年與Sir Anthony Beauchamp在英國貝德福爾結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1533年在英國素可布洛阿德沃特享年54歲，埋葬在英國貝德福爾貝德福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Anne West于大约1480年出生在英国素可时，她的父亲Thomas West 8th Baron de La Warre25岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Mortimer22岁。她于大约1504年与Sir Anthony Beauchamp在英国貝德福爾结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1533年在英国素可布洛阿德沃特享年54岁，埋葬在英国貝德福爾貝德福德。

nameMeanings.name: West
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and German: from Middle English, Middle High German west ‘west’, hence a topographic name for someone who lived to the west of a settlement, or a habitational name for someone who had migrated from further west.
Americanized form of Finnish Vesterinen: from the personal name Vesteri (a short form of Sylvester ) + the surname suffix -nen.

History: This name was brought to North America independently by many bearers in the 17th and 18th centuries. Thomas West, 12th Baron De La Warre, was captain general of Virginia in 1610–11. The state of DE is named for him. One of the earliest permanent settlers was Francis West (1606–92), who came to Duxbury, MA, from Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, in or before 1638.

variants.name: Western
meanings: English: from Middle English westerne ‘western’, denoting ‘(the man from the) west’. Compare West and Wester .
Norwegian: habitational name from the farm name Vestern, found in two places, a compound of vest ‘west’ + vin ‘meadow’, denoting a farm to the west.

variants.name: Sylvester
meanings: English and German: from the Middle English and Latin personal name Silvester ‘dweller in the forest’ (a derivative of silva ‘wood’). The name was borne by three popes, including a contemporary of Constantine the Great, and seems to have been first used in England by clerics.

variants.name: Westman
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Birgit, Erik, Hilmer, Nels.
Swedish: ornamental or topographic name from (an altered form of) the elements väst ‘west’ + -man. It is also found in Finland.
Americanized form of German Westmann: variant of West , with the addition of Middle High German man ‘man’.

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: ‘tendril’ or ‘creeper’, often used in metaphors describing the slender curvature of eyebrows, arms, hair, swords, lightning, and women's bodies.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Anne West was born about 1480, in Sussex, England, her father, Thomas West 8th Baron de La Warre, was 25 and her mother, Lady Elizabeth Mortimer, was 22. She married Sir Anthony Beauchamp about 1504, in Bedfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died in 1533, in Broadwater, Sussex, England, at the age of 54, and was buried in Bedford, Bedfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Anne West est née environ 1480, à Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Thomas West 8th Baron de La Warre, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Mortimer, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Anthony Beauchamp environ 1504, à Bedfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1533, à Broadwater, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à Bedford, Bedfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Anne West um 1480 in Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas West 8th Baron de La Warre 25 und ihre Mutter Lady Elizabeth Mortimer 22. Sie hat um 1504 in Bedfordshire, England Sir Anthony Beauchamp geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1533 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Broadwater, Sussex, England und wurde in Bedford, Bedfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Anne West è nata il circa 1480 nel Sussex, England, sua padre, Thomas West 8th Baron de La Warre, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Lady Elizabeth Mortimer, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Sir Anthony Beauchamp circa 1504, nel Bedfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì nel 1533, nel Broadwater, Sussex, England, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolta a Bedford, Bedfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Anne Westが約1480年にイギリススセックスで生まれた時，父Thomas West 8th Baron de La Warreは25歳，母Lady Elizabeth Mortimerは22歳であった。約1504年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアでSir Anthony Beauchampと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1533年にイギリススセックスブロアドワターで54歳で死去し，イギリスベドフォードシュアイアベドフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Anne West(이)가 대략 1480년 영국 수세스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas West 8th Baron de La Warre(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Mortimer(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1504년 영국 베드퍼드실르에서 Sir Anthony Beauchamp(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1533년 영국 수세스 브로드왓어에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 베드퍼드실르 베드퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Anne West nasceu aproximadamente 1480, em Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas West 8th Baron de La Warre, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Mortimer, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Anthony Beauchamp aproximadamente 1504, em Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1533, em Broadwater, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 54 anos, e foi sepultada em Bedford, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Anne West родилась около 1480 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas West 8th Baron de La Warre было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Mortimer, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Anthony Beauchamp около 1504 г. в местности бедфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1533 г. в местности броадвэитир, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности бедфорд, бедфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Anne West nació aproximadamente 1480, en Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas West 8th Baron de La Warre, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Mortimer, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Sir Anthony Beauchamp aproximadamente 1504, en Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió en 1533, en Broadwater, Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultada en Bedford, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.
